summary: Iteration 63: BUGFIX VERIFIED - visa-categories and generate endpoints now work without AI. Backend: 17/17 tests passed. Frontend: All UI flows working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 63 verified all bug fixes: (1) POST /api/ai-workflow/visa-categories now returns hardcoded data from COUNTRY_REFERENCES dict - NO AI CALL NEEDED, (2) POST /api/ai-workflow/generate uses template fallback from step_documents.py when AI fails, (3) Frontend removed duplicate service merging. Australia shows exactly 5 visa categories (PR, Visitor, Student, Work, Partner) with no duplicates. Clicking PR generates workflow with 5 steps and 21 documents using template fallback. Review view is fully editable with Required/Optional badges on documents.

visa_categories_australia_5_categories.details: Australia has exactly 5 categories: PR, Visitor, Student, Work, Partner

visa_categories_no_duplicates.details: No duplicate visa categories - IDs and names are unique

visa_categories_canada_4_categories.details: Canada has PR, Visitor, Student, Work categories

visa_categories_have_required_fields.details: Each category has id, name, description, category, official_url

generate_australia_pr_200.details: POST /api/ai-workflow/generate for Australia PR returns 200 (template fallback)

generate_australia_pr_5_steps_21_docs.details: Australia PR template has 5 steps with 21 documents

generate_workflow_required_fields.details: Generated workflow has product_name, description, category, steps

generate_steps_have_documents.details: Each step has step_name, step_order, required_documents

generate_documents_have_mandatory_flag.details: Each document has name and mandatory flag

generate_canada_pr_200.details: Canada PR generate also works with template fallback

ui_visa_categories_no_error.details: Clicking Australia shows visa categories - NO error toast

ui_5_visa_cards.details: 5 visa category cards displayed for Australia

ui_review_view_loads.details: Clicking PR category loads review view with generated workflow

ui_5_steps_displayed.details: 5 workflow steps displayed in review view

ui_required_optional_badges.details: Documents show Required/Optional badges (17 Required, 5 Optional)

bugfix_verification.original_issue: User reported 'Failed to load visa categories' error when clicking a country. Root cause: AI budget exceeded, endpoint was AI-dependent.

fix_applied.visa_categories_endpoint: Now returns hardcoded data from COUNTRY_REFERENCES dict - NO AI call needed. AI enrichment is optional (try/except).
fix_applied.generate_endpoint: Has template fallback using _find_best_template from step_documents.py when AI fails.
fix_applied.frontend: Removed duplicate service merging logic in AIWorkflowBuilder.jsx

bugfix_verification.verification_result: BUGFIX VERIFIED - All flows work without AI. LLM budget exceeded but template fallback works perfectly.

mocked_apis.ai_generation: LLM budget exceeded - template fallback works
